metadata.description: Multi-agent expert-team harness for Claude Code. Enforces a disciplined pipeline using native subagents, skills, hooks, and file-based state.

plugins.name: deep-build-harness
plugins.description: Multi-agent expert-team harness for Claude Code. Enforces a disciplined pipeline (interview → scan → architecture → plan → work → integration → audit → docs → release) using native subagents, skills, hooks, and file-based state. Each agent is context-isolated; an independent auditor verifies every task with real command execution.
